source_week35_strict_scoring.contains_value_rule: case-insensitive normalized whole-token regex boundary match
source_week35_strict_scoring.normalization: NFKD, remove combining marks, lowercase, normalize whitespace, strip outer punctuation
source_week35_strict_scoring.synthetic_system_prompt: You answer questions about fictional synthetic people using the provided learned facts.
source_week35_strict_scoring.general_system_prompt: Answer the question concisely. Return only the requested answer without explanation.

method: gradient ascent on forget loss plus gradient descent on retain loss
